summary: Completed testing of Discount & Price Override Audit System Phase 1. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Discounts tab verified working with proper filters and summary cards. Admin user verified to have editable discount/price fields in Order mode.

issues: Console shows HTML hydration warnings about table elements (<th> inside <span>, etc.) - minor React DOM nesting issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend implementation correct: has_perm() checks for sales.give_discount and sales.sell_below_cost permissions
Admin role bypasses permission checks (check_perm and has_perm return early for role=admin)
Cashier preset correctly has give_discount=false and sell_below_cost=false in ROLE_PRESETS
discount_audit_log collection correctly populated when sales have discounts/price overrides
GET /api/reports/discount-audit endpoint supports group_by (customer/cashier/detail), branch filter, and date range
Frontend ReportsPage has Discounts tab with data-testid='tab-discounts' and discount-audit-tab content

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Discounts tab working, Order mode fields editable for admin

seed_data_creation: Created test sales with line discounts, overall discounts, and below-cost sales during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 discount features fully implemented and verified. Backend permission guards working for give_discount and sell_below_cost. discount_audit_log collection entries created for discounted sales. Frontend Discounts tab in /reports shows filters (date, branch, group_by) and summary cards. To test cashier permission denial, need to create/find a cashier user without give_discount permission.

tests: test_admin_has_discount_permission - Admin role verified bypasses permission checks
test_admin_can_create_sale_with_line_discount - Sale with ₱10 line discount created successfully
test_admin_can_create_sale_with_overall_discount - Sale with ₱25 overall discount created successfully
test_admin_can_sell_below_cost - Admin sold item below capital successfully
test_sale_with_discount_creates_audit_log - Verified discount_audit_log entry created after discounted sale
test_discount_audit_grouped_by_customer - Returns groups array with summary
test_discount_audit_grouped_by_cashier - Returns groups grouped by cashier
test_discount_audit_detail_view - Returns flat rows array with item-level detail
test_discount_audit_date_filter - Date range filter works correctly

details: Discounts tab visible in /reports page with data-testid='tab-discounts'
Tab shows: Total Discounts, Price Overrides, Transactions, Period summary cards
Filters present: Date From/To, Branch dropdown, Group By selector
Table shows: Customer, Transactions, Total Discount, Price Override Diff columns
discount-audit-tab data-testid present on tab content
Order mode shows line item table with editable QTY, UNIT PRICE, DISCOUNT columns
Admin user (has give_discount=true) has 0 disabled inputs - all fields editable
Freight and Discount fields at bottom also editable for admin
